function.name: reoptimize
function.description: Re-run the optimizer with what-if changes. Supports dropping orders/locations/trailer configs, loosening capacity, widening delivery windows, forcing a hot-load store to be the first stop, and applying a weather override that restricts trailer types in a state.

extra_consideration.description: free-form note appended to the result.considerations list

capacity_relaxation_pct.description: Loosen weight + cube cap by this fraction (e.g. 0.05 for +5%).

window_slack_minutes.description: Widen every store delivery window by N minutes on each side.

priority_first.description: Store codes that must be sequenced as the first stop on whichever route serves them (hot-load).

weather_overrides.description: Per-state allow-list of trailer configs. e.g. {"MT": ["SINGLE_53"]} means only 53ft singles may operate in Montana.
